areas.name: threat_gauge
areas.description: Circular threat level indicator with real-time score

areas.name: main_map
areas.description: Live map showing cell towers and user location

areas.name: cell_info
areas.description: Detailed technical info of current connection (LAC, CID, etc.)

areas.name: signal_graph
areas.description: Real-time line chart of signal strength (dBm)

areas.name: encryption_status
areas.description: Status of cipher algorithms (A5/1, A5/3, GEA, etc.)

areas.name: recent_logs
areas.description: Scrollable list of recent events and detections

custom_components.name: ThreatGauge
custom_components.description: A circular gauge component using SVG or Recharts to show threat level (0-100). Colors change from Green (Low) to Red (Critical).

custom_components.name: SignalChart
custom_components.description: A real-time updating line chart using Recharts. Y-axis is dBm (-50 to -120). X-axis is time.

custom_components.name: CellInfoCard
custom_components.description: A card displaying key-value pairs of cell info. Uses monospace font for values.

custom_components.name: LogFeed
custom_components.description: A terminal-like list of events with timestamps and severity badges.

custom_components.name: RadarScan
custom_components.description: A CSS animation overlay that simulates a radar sweep over the map or dashboard.

images.description: Subtle digital grid texture for dashboard background (use with low opacity)

universal_guidelines: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all numeric data and IDs (LAC, CID, IMSI).
Ensure high contrast for all text. Avoid dark grey on black.
Use neon accents sparingly to draw attention to status changes.
Implement a 'scanline' effect using CSS pointer-events-none overlay for the 'hacker' feel.
Animations should be mechanical and precise (e.g., instant ease-out), not bouncy.
All cards must have a subtle border: border border-white/10.
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
